# importBrowserData(token:)

**Instance Method**

Imports another app’s browsing data as a stream.

## Declaration

```swift
@nonobjc final func importBrowserData(token: UUID) -> AsyncThrowingStream<BEBrowserData, any Error>
```

## Parameters

- **token**: A UUID that identifies the import operation. Pass the value from the activity’s info dictionary with the [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataImportManager/importTokenUserInfoKey-3bqve] key.

## Return Value

An [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/AsyncStream], in which you import the individual data types.

## Discussion

Call this method from the [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataImportManager/userActivityType-35jes] to begin receiving a stream of another app’s browsing data. For more information, see [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/transferring-browsing-data-to-another-browser].

## Importing browser data

- **requestImport(for:completionHandler:)**: Requests that the system display the sheet to import data from another browser.
